name: S-18 consumption trace writes a JSON trace file at the --emit path per the architecture trace shape
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --emit trace.json && [ -s trace.json ] && node -e 'JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("trace.json","utf8"))' && echo emitted 1>&2
